query: I need to build an executive dashboard for our CFO in Power BI. What should go on the single landing page and how do I arrange the KPI cards, revenue trend, and regional map so it reads top-down?
why: Audience-specific (exec) single-page layout and visual arrangement — core dashboard-composition.

query: how do i decide what visuals go on one screen for the warehouse ops team vs the analysts who drill into everything? feels like i'm cramming too much in
why: Operational vs analytical audience archetype + information density decision = dashboard composition.

query: My sales report page has 27 charts and it's a mess. Where should I put the slicers, and is there a layout grid or Z-pattern rule I should follow to clean it up?
why: Layout grid/Z-pattern, slicer placement, reducing visual count — squarely dashboard-composition.

query: We're standardizing report pages across the company. Can you recommend a color theme and palette that's accessible (colorblind-safe) and matches our brand blue #1F4E79?
why: Color-palette/theme guidance for accessibility and corporate branding is explicitly in scope.

query: putting together a quarterly board deck page in pbix — want like 5 big numbers at top then trend and a table below. how do i make it feel cohesive not random
why: Executive archetype, visual hierarchy, cohesion on one page = dashboard composition.

query: My report page is sluggish even though the model is fine. I think I just have way too many visuals on the canvas — how many is reasonable per page and what should I cut?
why: Report-page performance via visual count is an explicit composition heuristic (the model itself is fine, so not model perf).

query: designing an operational monitoring screen for the call center floor TV. needs to be glanceable, what archetype and layout works for a wall display
why: Operational dashboard archetype + layout for a glanceable single screen — uncommon but valid composition case.

query: Should the period slicer sit at the top spanning the page or in a left rail, and how do I make sure cross-filtering between the funnel and the bar chart behaves the way I want on this page?
why: Slicer placement + cross-filtering interactions across visuals on a page is in scope (composition owns layout/edit-interactions).

query: I have the right charts already picked for our marketing funnel — now I just need to lay them out as one polished landing page for the VP. Where do I start?
why: Visuals already chosen, now layout/composition for an exec audience — the exact last-step the skill owns.

query: how do i set up bookmarks to toggle between a summary view and a detail view on the same dashboard page so execs see the clean version first?
why: Bookmarks as a page-level interactivity/composition pattern for audience-tuned views; competes with building-interactive-reports but composition wins given the dashboard-layout framing.

query: What chart type should I use to show monthly inventory on-hand balances — it's a semi-additive measure so I'm worried a SUM line chart is wrong?
why: Single-visual choice driven by additivity — needs understanding-fact-additivity / mapping-questions-to-charts.

query: I want to add a Decomposition Tree and Key Influencers to explain why churn went up. How do I configure those AI visuals?
why: AI visual configuration — needs ai-powered-analysis-selection.

query: Set up drillthrough from my product summary table to a detail page filtered to the selected SKU, including the back button.
why: Drillthrough mechanics across pages — needs drill-pattern-design.

query: my dashboard is super slow to load and the pbix is 1.8GB, refresh times out. how do i shrink the model and use aggregations?
why: Large-model/refresh/aggregations performance — needs optimizing-model-performance, not page-visual-count.

query: I built a great exec dashboard, now how do I publish it to a workspace, package it as an app, and set up a weekly email subscription for leadership?
why: Publishing/apps/subscriptions — needs publishing-and-sharing-content.

query: Each regional manager should only see their own region's rows on the dashboard. How do I set up dynamic RLS so the same report filters per user?
why: Row-level security setup — needs securing-row-level-access despite 'dashboard' keyword.

query: For a retail POS analysis, what's the best visual to compare promo lift across product categories and show basket size by store?
why: Domain-specific visual selection (which chart per retail question) — needs retail-analytics-visualization.

query: I need a pixel-perfect printable monthly statement with a fixed header and page numbers that customers can get as PDF. Build it in Report Builder.
why: Paginated RDL printable report — needs building-paginated-reports, not interactive dashboard layout.

query: add slicers and a mobile phone layout to my existing report, plus tooltips on hover for each bar — focus is the interactive controls not the overall page design
why: Slicer/tooltip/mobile-layout mechanics on an existing report — better fit is building-interactive-reports.

query: How do I write a DAX measure for YoY revenue growth % so my cards on the dashboard show the right number?
why: DAX measure authoring / time intelligence — needs authoring-dax-measures or applying-time-intelligence, not layout.

query: we're moving our dashboard from dev to test to prod — how do deployment pipelines work and can I parameterize the data source per stage?
why: Dev/test/prod ALM — needs managing-deployment-lifecycle.
